subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, and thanksgiving be unto Thee, O my Beloved, for Thou hast exalted Thy Word and perfected Thy bounty and caused it to precede [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی و لک الشکر یا محبوبی علی ما علت کلمتک و تمت نعمتک و سبقت
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @love and unity, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @praise and encouragement
